steps.title: Identify the local claim
steps.content: The sentence before the underlined one says other animals also find tools helpful. The underlined boxer-crab sentence supplies support for that claim.

steps.title: Compare the functions
steps.content: Choice B adds an unsupported frequency comparison; Choice C shifts to human tool use; Choice D adds an unsupported intelligence comparison with birds. Choice A describes the sentence as an example of nonhuman tool use. The answer is A.
